description: When you want to show off your sporty style, there is no better way to do it than by carrying this bag from adidas. Height: 38 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 18 cm Made of 100% polyester with a nylon lining One main zippered compartment with a separator to hold your laptop Branding printed diagonally on the front Has two mesh pockets on the sides Padded and adjustable mesh shoulder straps with adidas logo Fabric haul loop for handling ease Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
